title: Model Accurate Hitbox Pack
description: Accurate hitbox pack with models that closely resemble the vanilla Minecraft style.
body:
Model Accurate Hitbox Pack

This pack changes models to more closely align with their respected hitboxes. The goal is to achieve this while staying true to the original appearance.

## Models - amethyst bud/cluster - azalea bush - bamboo - bell - big dripleaf - brewing stand - campfire - candle - chorus plant/flower - dragon egg - end rod - fence - fence gate - iron/copper bar (flicker fix) - chain - ladder - lectern - lightning rod - lily pad - pointed dripstone - powder snow (only texture) - sea pickle - soul soil (only texture) - turtle egg - wall - vine (only texture) - copper golem statue ## Screenshots
